items.name: Minigame Coin
items.description: A coin earned from playing minigames. Can be used to purchase items from the shop.

items.name: Minigame Token
items.description: A special token earned from winning minigames. Can be exchanged for rare items.

items.name: Minigame Trophy
items.description: A trophy awarded for exceptional performance in minigames. Provides a significant XP boost.

items.name: Lucky Amulet
items.description: An amulet that increases the chance of finding rare items.

items.name: Treasure Map
items.description: A map that leads to hidden treasures. Obtained from completing quests.

items.name: Event Badge
items.description: A special badge awarded during limited-time events.

items.name: Perch
items.description: A common freshwater fish found in many lakes and rivers. Provides a small XP boost.

items.name: Rainbow Trout
items.description: A colorful trout that's harder to catch. Provides a modest XP boost.

items.name: Blue Tang
items.description: A vibrant blue tropical fish that's challenging to catch. Provides a good XP boost.

items.name: Mahi-Mahi
items.description: A colorful and powerful game fish that's very difficult to catch. Provides a substantial XP boost.

items.name: Great White Shark
items.description: A massive predator that's extremely rare to catch. Provides a significant XP boost.

items.name: Coelacanth
items.description: A living fossil thought extinct for millions of years. Provides the maximum possible XP boost.

items.name: Guppy
items.description: A small, colorful freshwater fish popular in aquariums. Provides a small XP boost.

items.name: Anchovy
items.description: A small, common saltwater fish found in schools. Provides a small XP boost.

items.name: Salmon
items.description: A popular game fish known for swimming upstream to spawn. Provides a modest XP boost.

items.name: Tuna
items.description: A fast-swimming predatory fish prized for its meat. Provides a modest XP boost.

items.name: Clownfish
items.description: A vibrant reef fish known for its symbiotic relationship with sea anemones. Provides a good XP boost.

items.name: Swordfish
items.description: A large predatory fish with a distinctive bill resembling a sword. Provides a good XP boost.

items.name: Lionfish
items.description: A venomous fish with distinctive zebra-like stripes and fan-like fins. Provides a substantial XP boost.

items.name: Arapaima
items.description: One of the largest freshwater fish in the world, native to the Amazon basin. Provides a substantial XP boost.

items.name: Oarfish
items.description: A rarely seen deep-sea fish with a ribbon-like body that can grow up to 36 feet long. Provides a significant XP boost.

items.name: Sunfish
items.description: The heaviest known bony fish in the world with a distinctive flattened body. Provides a significant XP boost.

items.name: Whale Shark
items.description: The largest known living fish species, reaching lengths of up to 40 feet. Provides a near-maximum XP boost.
